Follow the instructions in [harness/prompts/1-bootstrap-fill.md](../../harness/prompts/1-bootstrap-fill.md).

Read the repository in token-disciplined passes (manifests → entry points → a sample per module, not everything), fill every `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` in `AGENTS.md`, and seed `memory/`. Mark anything you guessed with `(?)`. When done, tell me to run `/bootstrap-verify`.
